violations.text: Soap and paper towel was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap and paper towels. Soap and paper towels were added to hand sinks at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Cheese, and chocolate bananas were observed not labeled and from an unapproved source. Cheese and chocolate bananas were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Food must come labeled and from an approved source. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Fish was observed held between 47-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Fish was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in open air unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Various food products packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the small ice machine, and walk-in cooler door frame have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The walk-in cooler was observed leaking. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The wall in the backdoor area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
The meat cutting room is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
Bathroom sink is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Slicer blades located in the meat area was not in good repair. Inspector observed rust and pitting on the slicer blades. Slicers taken out of service until blades are replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The walls at mop sink, the window and door frames in meat cutting room are constructed of wood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
